name: Salmon Scramble
recipeIngredient: 213 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
213 g Canned Red Pimento Pepper, drained and chopped
100 g Button mushrooms, trimmed and sliced
4 slices Wholemeal toast OR 4 -Pitta breads (warmed and split)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon. Flake the fish and set aside.
2. Beat together the eggs, cream or fromage frais, and seasoning in a bowl.
3. Heat the sunflower oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
4. Gently scramble the egg mixture until it is light and just beginning to thicken.
5. Add the flaked salmon, chopped red pimento pepper, and sliced mushrooms to the eggs. Continue cooking for a few more seconds until heated through.
6. Spoon the scrambled mixture onto warmed wholemeal toast or into warmed pitta breads.
7. Serve hot.
Serves 4. Approx. 425 kcals per serving.
